title: 48-hour integration accounts retain at 2.3x the 90-day rate
anchor: 26 of 47 Q1 implementations connected their first integration within 48 hours of kickoff.
connect: Accounts that integrated after the first week showed significantly lower retention.
body: 26 of 47 Q1 implementations connected their first integration within 48 hours of kickoff. Accounts that integrated after the first week showed significantly lower retention.
trace: Q1 cohort data showing early integration speed correlates with long-term retention patterns.
